description: Schedule a 3-part onboarding sequence for new hire 'Sarah Connor' on Friday of next week (the week starting after the coming Monday). Create three calendar events: 'IT Setup - Sarah Connor' from 09:00 to 10:00 at the IT Helpdesk with attendee David Chen; 'HR Benefits Orientation - Sarah Connor' from 10:00 to 11:00 at the HR Office with attendee Grace Patel; and 'Welcome Lunch - Sarah Connor' from 12:00 to 13:30 at the Northbridge Cafeteria with attendee Alice Johnson. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin' if prompted.
